---
name: Bug Report / Bug 反馈
about: Report site issues, data errors, or interaction problems / 报告网站异常、数据错误或交互问题
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ""
---

## Problem Description / 问题描述

Please briefly describe the problem you encountered.
请简要描述你遇到的问题。

## Steps To Reproduce / 复现步骤

1. Which page did you open? / 进入哪个页面
2. What did you click? / 点击了什么
3. What problem did you see? / 看到了什么问题

## Expected Result / 预期结果

Please describe what you expected to happen.
请描述你原本期望看到的结果。

## Screenshots Or Recordings / 截图或录屏

If possible, attach screenshots or a screen recording.
如果方便，请附上截图或录屏。

## Environment / 环境信息

- Device / 设备：
- Browser / 浏览器：
- OS / 系统：

## Additional Notes / 其他补充

Add any extra context here if needed.
如有其他上下文，请补充在这里。
